---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code.

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Cmd+Shift+Enter*.

```{r}
plot(cars)
```

Add a new chunk by clicking the *Insert Chunk* button on the toolbar or by pressing *Cmd+Option+I*.

When you save the notebook, an HTML file containing the code and output will be saved alongside it (click the *Preview* button or press *Cmd+Shift+K* to preview the HTML file).

The preview shows you a rendered HTML copy of the contents of the editor. Consequently, unlike *Knit*, *Preview* does not run any R code chunks. Instead, the output of the chunk when it was last run in the editor is displayed.

Let's create a vector of all the properties based on the parcel id

```{r}
bor <- tibble(
  parid = c(2050071, 3886802, 3894329, 3889887, 3889541, 3888293, 1502047, 0101327, 6594167, 1456007, 1630131, 5211904, 0454017),
  time = c( 0900, 0930, 1000, 1030, 1100, 1130, 1300, 1330, 1400, 1430, 1500, 1530, 1600), 
  appraised_value = c(70900, 581700, 639900, 647700, 443300, 435800, 47300, 145000, 476700, 244700, 173100, 348800, 65600), 
  requested_amount = c(55000, 475000, 498300, 490000, 375000, 375000, 30000, 122000, 427000, 195000, 140000, 312000, 65600)
)


bor
```

```{r}
bor <- bor |> 
  mutate(diff_in_price = appraised_value - requested_amount)
bor
```

```{r}
bor_0900 <- read_csv("/Users/deen/Downloads/Report-4.csv") |> 
  filter(tla > 1400 & tla < 1750, stories == "ONE STORY WITH ATTIC")
bor_0900

bor_0900 |> 
  mutate(average_price = mean(`last sale price`), 
         average_tla = mean(tla), 
         )
```

```{r}
bor_1000 <- read_csv("/Users/deen/Downloads/Report-6.csv") 
bor
outlier_price <- outliers::outlier(bor_1000$`last sale price`)
outlier_price

```

```{r}
bor_1000 <- bor_1000 |> 
  filter(tla > 2900 & tla < 3300, 
         `last sale price` != 0, 
         `last sale price` != 1050000, 
         `last sale price` != 75000)

bor_1000 |> 
  lm()
```

```{r}
mean(bor_1000$`last sale price`)


```

### BOR Case 202520217 - Issa Khalil

```{r}
bor_1030 <- read_csv("/Users/deen/Downloads/Report-5.csv")
```

```{r}
outliers::outlier(bor_1030$`last sale price`)
bor_1030 <- bor_1030 |> 
  filter(tla > 3200 & tla < 3600, 
         `last sale price` -0 & `last sale price` -1350000)
bor_1030
```

Citizen states that based on the comparable in the neighborhood he 3936 Brothridge DR

3644 Boulder Ridge Dr - \$450,000

3544 Deer Creek Dr - \$450000

2025 Boulder Ridge - \$495000

7336 Woodstone DR - \$505000

7920 Windsorwood CT - 590000

```{r}
mean(bor_1030$`last sale price`)
mean(bor_1030$tla)
var(bor_1030$`last sale price`)
```

```{r}
sqrt(var(bor_1030$`last sale price`))
```

# BOR JUNE 16TH 2026

## 1. 0900: 78-50587

Property was built in 2017, has 2,434 sqft, Grade of B, 3 bedrooms, 2 baths, Wall Type Metal/Vinyl, attached 2 car garage, and a full basement.

```{r}
bor_data_model <- 
  res_sales |> 
  select(SaleAmount,
         MktArea,
         SalesDate,
         Parcel,
         TLA,
         Acres,
         YearBlt,
         MailAddress,
         City,
         State,
         Zip,
         Grade,
         Landuse,
         ZONING,
         Cond,
         GarageType,
         GarageSqFt,
         BsmtType,
         FullBath,
         HalfBath,
         Occupancy,
         Stories,
         Wall,
         BedRms,
         Frontage,
         Depth, 
         Rooms, 
         Lotsize,
         BaseAtt,
         BaseBsmt,
         HVAC, 
         DeedType,
         TD,
         STREET,
         TRAFFIC, 
         UTIL
                
      ) 

bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2023R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA >= 2200 & TLA < 2700)

bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2023R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA >= 2200 & TLA < 2700) |> 
  mutate(Average_Sale = mean(SaleAmount),
         Sd_Sale = sd(SaleAmount),
         .after = SalesDate
         ) 
```

```{r}
marketbor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2023R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         YearBlt != "0"
         )


```

## 2. 0930: 78-55754

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2016R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA >= 2600 & TLA < 2900
         ) 
```

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2016R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA >= 2400 & TLA < 2900
         ) |>  
  mutate(Average_Sale = mean(SaleAmount),
         Sd_Sale = sd(SaleAmount), 
         Average_TLA = mean(TLA),
         Average_YearBlt = mode(YearBlt), 
         .after = YearBlt)
```

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2016R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA >= 2400 & TLA < 2900
         ) |>  
  mutate(Average_Sale = mean(SaleAmount),
         Sd_Sale = sd(SaleAmount), 
         Average_TLA = mean(TLA),
         Average_YearBlt = mode(YearBlt), 
         .after = YearBlt) |> 
  ggplot(aes(SalesDate, SaleAmount))+
  geom_line()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
```

## 3. 1000: 38-40928

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2702R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA >= 3000 & TLA < 3700
         ) 
```

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2702R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA >= 3000 & TLA < 3700
         ) |>  
  mutate(Average_Sale = mean(SaleAmount),
         Sd_Sale = sd(SaleAmount), 
         Average_TLA = mean(TLA),
         Average_YearBlt = mode(YearBlt), 
         .after = YearBlt) |> 
  ggplot(aes(SalesDate, SaleAmount))+
  geom_line()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
```

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2702R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA >= 3000 & TLA < 3700
         ) |>  
  mutate(Average_Sale = mean(SaleAmount),
         Sd_Sale = sd(SaleAmount), 
         Average_TLA = mean(TLA),
         Average_YearBlt = mode(YearBlt), 
         .after = YearBlt) |> 
  view()
```

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2702R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA >= 2800
         ) |>  
  
```

## 4. 1030: 78-61107

`{r}mutate(Average_Sale = mean(SaleAmount),}          Sd_Sale = sd(SaleAmount),           Average_TLA = mean(TLA),          Average_YearBlt = mode(YearBlt),           .after = YearBlt) |>    view() bor_data_model |>    filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026,           MktArea == "2008R",          SaleAmount > 1,           TLA >= 1000 & TLA < 1500          ) |>    view()`

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2008R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA >= 1000 & TLA < 1500
         ) |> 
  ggplot(aes(SalesDate, SaleAmount))+
  geom_line()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
```

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2008R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA >= 1000 & TLA < 1500
         ) |> 
  mutate(Average_Sale = mean(SaleAmount),
         Sd_Sale = sd(SaleAmount), 
         Average_TLA = mean(TLA),
         Average_YearBlt = mode(YearBlt), 
         .after = YearBlt) |> 
  view()
```

## 5. 11:30 - 78-67174

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2016R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA >= 2700 & TLA < 3200
         )
```

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2016R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA >= 2700 & TLA < 3200
         ) |> 
  ggplot(aes(SalesDate, SaleAmount))+
  geom_line()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
```

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2016R",
         SaleAmount > 1 & SaleAmount < 800000
         ) |> 
  ggplot(aes(SalesDate, SaleAmount))+
  geom_line()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
```

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2016R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA >= 2700 & TLA < 3200
         ) |> 
   mutate(Average_Sale = mean(SaleAmount),
         Sd_Sale = sd(SaleAmount), 
         Average_TLA = mean(TLA),
         Average_YearBlt = mode(YearBlt), 
         .after = YearBlt) |> 
  view()
```

## 6. 1330 78-77311

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2016R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA >= 2200 & TLA < 2600
         )
```

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2016R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA >= 2200 & TLA < 2600
         ) |> 
  ggplot(aes(SalesDate, SaleAmount))+
  geom_line()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
```

## 7. 1400: 7877467

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2016R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA >= 2600 & TLA < 2900
         )
```

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2016R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA >= 2600 & TLA < 2900
         ) |> 
  ggplot(aes(SalesDate, SaleAmount))+
  geom_line()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
```

```{r}
bor_mod_1 <- bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2016R",
         SaleAmount > 1
         ) |>  
  select(SaleAmount, 
                MktArea,
                SalesDate,
                Parcel, 
                TLA,
                Acres,
                Zip,
                Grade,
                Landuse,
                ZONING,
                Cond,
                GarageType,
                BsmtType, 
                FullBath,
                HalfBath,
                Stories,
                Wall,
                YearBlt, 
                BedRms,
                Frontage,
                Depth, 
                Rooms, 
                Lotsize,
                BaseAtt,
                BaseBsmt,
                HVAC,
                DeedType, 
                TD,
                STREET,
                TRAFFIC, 
                UTIL )

ols_mod <- lm(log(SaleAmount) ~ TLA + YearBlt + year(SalesDate) + as.factor(Wall) + as.factor(HVAC), data = bor_mod_1)

stargazer(ols_mod, type = "text")
```

## 8. 79-73473

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2002R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA >= 2100 & TLA < 2500
         )
```

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2002R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA >= 2100 & TLA < 2600
         ) |> 
  ggplot(aes(SalesDate, SaleAmount))+
  geom_line()+ 
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
```

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2002R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA >= 2100 & TLA < 2700
         ) |> 
   mutate(Average_Sale = mean(SaleAmount),
         Sd_Sale = sd(SaleAmount), 
         Average_TLA = mean(TLA),
         Average_YearBlt = mode(YearBlt), 
         .after = YearBlt)
  
```

# BOR JUNE 17TH 2026

## 1. PARCEL 78-67512

This parcel is 3,489 SQFT, Grade of A (8)

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2016R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA >= 3200 & TLA < 3600
        
         ) |> 
  mean(SaleAmount)
```

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2016R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA >= 3200 & TLA < 3600
        
         ) |> 
  mutate(Average_Sale = mean(SaleAmount), 
         Grade_Average = mean(Grade), 
         TLA_Average = mean(TLA), 
         .after = TLA )
```

```{r}

```

## 2. Parcel 7884287

```{r}
mod_2 <- bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2016R",
         SaleAmount > 1
        
         )

mod_2
```

```{r}
ols_mod_2 <- lm(log(SaleAmount) ~ TLA + YearBlt + year(SalesDate) + as.factor(Wall) + as.factor(HVAC) + as.factor(Grade) + as.factor(Cond) + as.factor(GarageType) + as.factor(BsmtType) + as.factor(Stories) + as.factor(Wall) + as.factor(TRAFFIC) , data = mod_2)

stargazer(ols_mod_2, type = "text")
```

```{r}
ols_mod_2 <- lm(log(SaleAmount) ~ TLA + YearBlt + year(SalesDate) + as.factor(Cond), data = mod_2)
```

## 3. 79-72107

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2007R",
         SaleAmount > 1
        
         ) 
```

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2007R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA > 2200 & TLA > 2700
        
         ) |> 
   mutate(Average_Sale = mean(SaleAmount),
         Sd_Sale = sd(SaleAmount), 
         Average_TLA = mean(TLA),
         Average_YearBlt = mode(YearBlt), 
         .after = YearBlt)
  
  
```

# BOR JUNE 23RD 2026

## 1. 0930: 6519204

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2404R",
         SaleAmount > 1,
         TLA > 1000 & TLA < 1500
        
         ) 
```

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2404R",
         SaleAmount > 1,
         TLA > 1000 & TLA < 1500
        
         ) |> 
  mutate(Average_Sale = mean(SaleAmount),
         Sd_Sale = sd(SaleAmount), 
         Average_TLA = mean(TLA),
         Average_YearBlt = mode(YearBlt), 
         .after = YearBlt,)
  
```

## 2. 1000:

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "3103R",
         SaleAmount > 1,
         TLA > 800 & TLA < 1000
        
         )
```

## 3. 1030: 6546827

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2406R",
         SaleAmount > 1,
         Acres >= 5
  ) |> 
  view()
```

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2406R",
         SaleAmount > 1,
         TLA >= 1200 & TLA <=1700
  )
```

## 4. 1130: 7971191

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2002R",
         SaleAmount > 1,
         TLA > 2600 & TLA < 3200,
         YearBlt >= 1991 & YearBlt <= 1999
        
         ) |> 
  mutate(Average_Sale = mean(SaleAmount), 
          Sd_Sale = sd(SaleAmount), 
         Average_TLA = mean(TLA),
         Average_YearBlt = median(YearBlt), 
         .after = YearBlt)
```

```{r}
options(scipen = 9999)
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2002R",
         SaleAmount > 1,
         TLA > 2600 & TLA < 3200,
        
         ) |> 
  ggplot(aes(SalesDate, SaleAmount))+
  geom_line()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
```

## 5. 1330: 1405461

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2002R",
         SaleAmount > 185000, 
         YearBlt > 2020
        
         ) |> 
mutate(Average_Sale = mean(SaleAmount), 
          Sd_Sale = sd(SaleAmount), 
         Average_TLA = mean(TLA),
         Average_YearBlt = median(YearBlt), 
         .after = YearBlt) 
```

## 

6.  1400: 79-09081

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2005R",
         SaleAmount > 1,
         TLA >= 3000 & TLA <= 3400,
         YearBlt >= 2005 & YearBlt <= 2021
        
         ) |> 
mutate(Average_Sale = mean(SaleAmount), 
          Sd_Sale = sd(SaleAmount), 
         Average_TLA = mean(TLA),
         Average_YearBlt = median(YearBlt), 
         .after = YearBlt) 
```

## 

7.  1430: 79-72312

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2002R",
         SaleAmount > 1,
         TLA >= 2800 & TLA <= 3100,
         YearBlt >= 1997 & YearBlt <= 2003
        
         ) |> 
mutate(Average_Sale = mean(SaleAmount), 
          Sd_Sale = sd(SaleAmount), 
         Average_TLA = mean(TLA),
         Average_YearBlt = median(YearBlt), 
         .after = YearBlt) 
```

## 

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2002R",
         SaleAmount > 1,
         TLA >= 2800 & TLA <= 3100,
         YearBlt >= 1997 & YearBlt <= 2003
        
         ) |> 
  ggplot(aes(SalesDate, SaleAmount))+
  geom_line()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
```

## 8. 1530: 84-22364

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "1012R",
         SaleAmount > 1,
         TLA >= 1100 & TLA <= 1300
        
         ) |> 
mutate(Average_Sale = mean(SaleAmount), 
          Sd_Sale = sd(SaleAmount), 
         Average_TLA = mean(TLA),
         Average_YearBlt = median(YearBlt), 
         .after = YearBlt) 
```

## 

9.  1600: 79-71600

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2002R",
         SaleAmount > 185000,
         TLA >= 1900 & TLA <= 2100,
         YearBlt <= 2003
        
         ) |> 
mutate(Average_Sale = mean(SaleAmount), 
          Sd_Sale = sd(SaleAmount), 
         Average_TLA = mean(TLA),
         Average_YearBlt = median(YearBlt), 
         .after = YearBlt)
```

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2002R",
         SaleAmount > 185000
         ) |> 
  ggplot(aes(SalesDate, SaleAmount))+
  geom_line()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
```

```{r}
c_mod <- bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2002R",
         SaleAmount > 185000
         ) 

glm(SaleAmount ~ TLA + as.factor(Yearblt) + as.factor(Grade) + as.factor(Wall), data = c_mod)
```

# BOR JUNE 25TH 2026

## 1. 0900: 8811361

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "1805R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA > 0
        
         ) |> 
  mutate(Average_Sale = mean(SaleAmount), 
          Sd_Sale = sd(SaleAmount), 
         Average_TLA = mean(TLA),
         Average_YearBlt = median(YearBlt), 
         .after = YearBlt)
```

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "1805R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA > 0
        
         ) |> 
  ggplot(aes(SalesDate, SaleAmount))+
  geom_line()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
```

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "1805R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA > 0
        
         ) |> 
  ggplot(aes(TLA, SaleAmount))+
  geom_line()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
```

## 2. 0930: 44-91181

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "1507R",
         SaleAmount > 120000, 
         TLA > 0
        
         ) |> 
  mutate(Average_Sale = mean(SaleAmount), 
          Sd_Sale = sd(SaleAmount), 
         Average_TLA = mean(TLA),
         Average_YearBlt = median(YearBlt), 
         .after = YearBlt)
```

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "1507R",
         SaleAmount > 120000, 
         TLA >= 2000 & TLA <= 2700
        
         ) |> 
  mutate(Average_Sale = mean(SaleAmount), 
          Sd_Sale = sd(SaleAmount), 
         Average_TLA = mean(TLA),
         Average_YearBlt = median(YearBlt), 
         .after = YearBlt)
```

## 3. 1000: 79-74300

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2019R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA > 0
        
         ) |> 
  mutate(Average_Sale = mean(SaleAmount), 
          Sd_Sale = sd(SaleAmount), 
         Average_TLA = mean(TLA),
         Average_YearBlt = median(YearBlt), 
         .after = YearBlt)
```

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2019R",
         SaleAmount > 1 & SaleAmount < 900000, 
         TLA >1800, 
         YearBlt <= 2010
        
         ) |> 
  mutate(Average_Sale = mean(SaleAmount), 
          Sd_Sale = sd(SaleAmount), 
         Average_TLA = mean(TLA),
         Average_YearBlt = median(YearBlt), 
         .after = YearBlt)
```

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2019R",
         SaleAmount > 1 & SaleAmount < 580000, 
         TLA >= 2800 & TLA <= 3500, 
         YearBlt <= 2010
        
         ) |> 
  mutate(Average_Sale = mean(SaleAmount), 
          Sd_Sale = sd(SaleAmount), 
         Average_TLA = mean(TLA),
         Average_YearBlt = median(YearBlt), 
         .after = YearBlt)
```

```{r}
x = 476611
y = 507083

print((x+y)/2)
```

## 3. 1030: 78-44831

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2015R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA >= 2900 & TLA <= 3500,
        
         ) |> 
  mutate(Average_Sale = mean(SaleAmount), 
          Sd_Sale = sd(SaleAmount), 
         Average_TLA = mean(TLA),
         Average_YearBlt = median(YearBlt), 
         .after = YearBlt)
```

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2015R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA >= 2900 & TLA <= 3500,
        
         ) |> 
 ggplot(aes(YearBlt, SaleAmount))+
  geom_line()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
```

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2015R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA >= 2900 & TLA <= 3500,
         YearBlt >= 1950 & YearBlt <= 1985
        
         )|> 
  mutate(Average_Sale = mean(SaleAmount), 
          Sd_Sale = sd(SaleAmount), 
         Average_TLA = mean(TLA),
         Average_YearBlt = median(YearBlt), 
         .after = YearBlt)
```

```{r}
x = 441062.5
y = 3284.5

z = x/y

z
```

```{r}
3288 * z
```

## 4. 1100: 79-10027

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2005R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA >= 3400 & TLA <= 3850
        
         )|> 
  mutate(Average_Sale = mean(SaleAmount), 
          Sd_Sale = sd(SaleAmount), 
         Average_TLA = mean(TLA),
         Average_YearBlt = median(YearBlt), 
         .after = YearBlt)
```

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2005R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA >= 3400 & TLA <= 3850
        
         ) |> 
  ggplot(aes(YearBlt, SaleAmount))+
  geom_line()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
```

```{r}
bor_data_model |> 
  filter(year(SalesDate) >= 2022 & year(SalesDate) < 2026, 
         MktArea == "2005R",
         SaleAmount > 1, 
         TLA >= 3400 & TLA <= 3850,
         YearBlt >= 1990 & YearBlt <= 2000
        
         ) |> 
 mutate(Average_Sale = mean(SaleAmount), 
          Sd_Sale = sd(SaleAmount), 
         Average_TLA = mean(TLA),
         Average_YearBlt = median(YearBlt), 
         .after = YearBlt)
```

```{r}
avg_sqft <- 592500/3616.5
avg_sqft

```

```{r}
3736 * avg_sqft
```

## 5. 1300:
